title: Pure & Natural Beef Paddywack for Dogs - High Protein, Hypoallergenic, Long Lasting Dog Chews for Puppies, Seniors, and Natural Dog Treats 200g Back (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Natural Dog Chews: No additives to these paddywack treats make them wholesome & healthy dog treats for large dogs & smal dogs alike.
Promotes Dental Health: Each natural dog treat helps abrade plaque and tartar as your dog chews.
Long Lasting: These make great natural dog treats for large dogs and aggressive chewers to keep them amused for hours.
Healthy Snacks: Made from beef tendons for dogs, specifically from the neck tendons, low in fat and high in protien.
200g Bag: Enjoy this bag of tasty animal dog treats, packed with flavour your dog will love.
description: Indications Crude Protein 76.59%, Crude Fat 11.49%, Crude Ash 2%, Crude Fibre 1.2% Ingredients 100% Natural Beef Paddywack Directions Store in a cool dry place. Please follow all instructions provided on packaging. See more

specifications_table.Allergen Information: Allergen-Free, Gluten Free, Grain-Free, Lactose Free, Preservative-Free
